whyMessaging.title: Adɛn Messaging Platforms Matter Pii Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one of no most important tools ma communication mu today’s world. Efi personal conversations kɔ business interactions, messaging apps allow nnipa kɔ stay connected instantly ne efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Nnipa rely so messaging apps ma daily communication ne nnamfo, abusua, ne colleagues. Whether it's bi quick update anaa bi long conversation, messaging provides bi convenient ne flexible way kɔ stay mu touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of no main advantages of messaging platforms yɛ their speed. Nkratoɔ yɛ delivered instantly, allowing dwumadifo kɔ communicate mu real time. Yi level of convenience has made messaging no preferred method of communication ma many nnipa.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect nnipa across no globe. ne internet access, dwumadifo tumi communicate regardless of location, making it easier kɔ build relationships ne collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus so giving dwumadifo control over their data ne conversations. Features like encryption, kokoamsɛm nhyehyɛe, ne nkratoɔ controls allow dwumadifo kɔ communicate ne confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues kɔ evolve ne foforo features such sɛ AI-powered responses, nkyerɛase, ne multimedia sharing. sɛ technology advances, messaging platforms bɛ become even pii powerful ne versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia yɛ built ne these principles mu mind, offering bi fast, ahotɔ mu, ne user-friendly messaging experience ma bi connected world.

global.title: No Future of Wiase nyinaa Communication
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over no past few decades. Dɛn once ɛho hia telefon frɛfrɛ anaa in-person meetings tumi seesei yɛ done quickly through messaging platforms. sɛ technology continues kɔ advance, wiase nyinaa communication yɛ becoming faster, pii accessible, ne pii inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One of no biggest changes mu communication yɛ no reduction of geographic barriers. Nnipa tumi seesei connect ne others across no world mu near real time. Whether ma personal conversations, business, anaa collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far sua limiting.
global.translationDesc: Kasa has traditionally been one of no biggest obstacles kɔ wiase nyinaa communication. Ɛnnɛ, built-in nkyerɛase tools mmoa bridge no gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow dwumadifo kɔ communicate pii easily even sɛ they speak different languages, creating foforo opportunities ma connection ne understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed yɛ bi key factor shaping modern communication. Dwumadifo expect nkratoɔ kɔ yɛ delivered quickly, ne modern infrastructure supports no expectation. Real-time messaging enables pii natural ne fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: sɛ communication becomes pii digital, kokoamsɛm ne ahobammɔ yɛ increasingly important. Dwumadifo want confidence no their conversations yɛ wɔabɔ ho ban. Features like encryption ne user-controlled nhyehyɛe mmoa support bi pii ahotɔ mu communication experience.
global.futureDesc: No future of wiase nyinaa communication bɛ likely include pii advanced tools, such sɛ AI-assisted messaging, improved nkyerɛase, ne enhanced dwumadini experiences. sɛ technology evolves, communication bɛ kɔ so kɔ become pii intuitive ne accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia yɛ part of yi shift, helping nnipa connect pii easily across languages ne borders.

textnow.body: Lighter ads so Free, bi simple Plus ma so bere bɛn you’re ready, ne Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Nne
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, ne built-in nkyerɛase instead of old-school frɛ forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs nkɔmmɔbɔ apps
messengers.body: Text real telefon nɔmas — nnyɛ just other app dwumadifo — ne AI ne status built mu. Great sɛ you’re coming efi apps like TextFree anaa TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based so publicly ɛwɔ hɔ information ne betumi change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree anaa TextMe yɛ generally similar kɔ TextNow.

free.q: yɛ no Free plan really free?
free.a: Aane. No Free plan includes bi Chatforia nɔma, calling, ne messaging ne ads. Wo tumi stay so Free sɛ long sɛ wo like, anaa ma so kɔ yi fi hɔ ads ne bue pii features.

plusPremium.q: What’s no difference between Plus ne Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads ne extends wo nkratoɔ abakɔsɛm — perfect ma everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools ma rewrites ne replies, ne priority support ma heavy dwumadifo.

esim.q: Ɛhe do eSIM data packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses wiase nyinaa eSIM coverage. Availability depends so wo ɔman ne device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside no app.

cancel.q: Tumi Me twa mu anaa change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Aane. Wo tumi hwɛ so anaa twa mu wo subscription efi no tua-sika kratafa mu no app. Changes take effect at no awie of wo tua-sika bere bi ɛrekɔ enti.

family.a: Abusua packs yɛ bi wɔakyɛ data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One onipa pays no bill, ne wo tumi to nsa frɛ anaa yi fi hɔ members ne set limits per onipa.

section3.title: 3) Go further

section3.item2: Once you’re signed mu, wo tumi link additional mfiri ne set up backup bi wɔayɛ encrypteds efi Nhyehyɛe mu no app.

privacy.a: Aane. Nkratoɔ ne frɛfrɛ yɛ end-to-end wɔayɛ encrypted nam default. Nko ara wo ne no recipient tumi kenkan them.

translate.a: Ma ɛnyɛ adwuma “Auto-translate” mu Nhyehyɛe → Appearance & Kasa. Yɛn kyerɛ ase on-device ɛhe supported, otherwise through ahotɔ mu APIs ne minimal metadata.

privacyPolicy.title: Kokoamsɛm Mmara
privacyPolicy.lastUpdated: Bere a wɔyɛɛ no foforo koraa:

intro.body: Yi Kokoamsɛm Mmara explains sɛnea Chatforia (“yɛn”, “yɛn”) collects, uses, ne shares information bere bɛn wo use yɛn apps ne services. Yɛn design Chatforia kɔ minimize no data yɛn tumi access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information yɛn collect
infoWeCollect.account: Akawnt info (e.g., email/phone) kɔ yɛ ne ahotɔ mu wo akawnt.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Wɔayɛ encrypted content (nkratoɔ/calls) yɛ end-to-end wɔayɛ encrypted; yɛn can’t kenkan it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, anaa coarse analytics kɔ improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile telefon nɔmas ne SMS
sms.body: sɛ wo paw kɔ provide bi mobile telefon nɔma, yɛn use it kɔ ma ɛnyɛ adwuma features such sɛ akawnt verification, login kɔkɔbɔ, ne user-to-user messaging via SMS ɛhe supported. Yɛn betumi soma transactional SMS nkratoɔ related kɔ wo akawnt ne activity so Chatforia. Wo tumi opt out of receiving SMS nkratoɔ at any time nam replying ne bi supported opt-out keyword (such sɛ “STOP”) anaa nam changing wo nkratoɔbɔ preferences mu no app. Yɛn do nnyɛ sell wo telefon nɔma anaa use it ma unrelated marketing.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Yɛn don’t sell personal data. Yɛn betumi kyɛ limited data ne processors (e.g., push nkratoɔbɔ, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Wo rights
rights.body: Depending so wo region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), wo betumi request access, correction, deletion, anaa opt-out of certain processing. Frɛ: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & ahobammɔ
retention.body: Yɛn retain nko ara what’s needed kɔ operate no dwumadie ne apply industry-standard ahobammɔ. E2E content can’t yɛ decrypted nam yɛn.

children.title: Children

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: sɛ wo provide bi mobile telefon nɔma, wo agree no Chatforia betumi soma wo SMS nkratoɔ related kɔ wo akawnt ne use of no dwumadie, such sɛ login kɔkɔbɔ, ahobammɔ nkratoɔbɔ, ne nkratoɔ related kɔ conversations wo initiate anaa participate mu. Yɛn do nnyɛ use SMS ma promotional anaa marketing nkratoɔ a enni wo explicit consent. Standard nkratoɔ ne data rates betumi apply. Wo tumi opt out of SMS nkratoɔ at any time nam replying ne bi supported opt-out keyword (ma example, “STOP”) anaa nam updating wo nkratoɔbɔ nhyehyɛe mu no app.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: Ma media inquiries, reach yɛn at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia yɛ bi privacy-first messaging app no makes cross-language nkɔmmɔbɔ effortless. Nkratoɔ yɛ end-to-end wɔayɛ encrypted nam default, ne built-in nkyerɛase supports 100+ languages mu real time. Dwumadifo tumi ma ɛnyɛ adwuma nkratoɔ bi ɛyera, kora so akenkan ho adanse wopɛ a, ne sync across mfiri. Ɛwɔ hɔ so iOS, Android, ne no web.

careers.title: Adwuma hokwan
careers.intro: We’re bi ketewa founding kuw building Chatforia — bi kokoam, wiase nyinaa messenger launching so web, iOS, ne Android. sɛ wo care ɛfa ho kokoamsɛm, encryption, ne delightful dwumadini experiences, we’d love kɔ hear efi wo.
careers.openRoles: Bue founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Ahobammɔ & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Sɛnea kɔ apply: Use no button below kɔ email wo resume ne links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Mmoa build no foundation of bi foforo wiase nyinaa messenger.
• Ship improvements wɔde adi dwuma across web, iOS, ne Android.
• Work directly ne no founder so architecture ne product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of no stack: messaging, nne, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Kɔ mu at no beginning — before no dwumadini base scales.

about.title: Ɛfa ho Chatforia
